title: Governance Health
description: Monitor AI agent governance — policy evaluations, violations, trust scores, and enforcement latency across your agent fleet.

b2d4f6a8-1c3e-4a5b-8d7f-9e0a1b2c3d4e.title: Total Policy Evaluations
b2d4f6a8-1c3e-4a5b-8d7f-9e0a1b2c3d4e.description: Total number of governance policy evaluations in the selected time period with trend comparison

config.query:
WITH
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.start}}') AS start_time,
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.end}}') AS end_time,
    (end_time - start_time) AS duration,
    (start_time - duration) AS prev_start_time,
    (end_time - duration) AS prev_end_time

SELECT
    CAST(countIf(
        Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
    ) AS INTEGER) AS total_evaluations,

    CAST(countIf(
        Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= prev_end_time
    ) AS INTEGER) AS previous_total_evaluations,

    round(
        if(
            countIf(Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= prev_end_time) = 0,
            countIf(Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time) * 100.0,
            (
                countIf(Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time) -
                countIf(Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= prev_end_time)
            ) /
            countIf(Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= prev_end_time) * 100.0
        ), 4
    ) AS rate
FROM otel_traces
WHERE
    SpanName = 'governance.policy.evaluation'
    AND Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time

c3e5a7b9-2d4f-4c6a-9e8b-0f1a2b3c4d5f.title: Total Violations
c3e5a7b9-2d4f-4c6a-9e8b-0f1a2b3c4d5f.description: Total number of governance violations detected in the selected time period with trend comparison

config.query:
WITH
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.start}}') AS start_time,
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.end}}') AS end_time,
    (end_time - start_time) AS duration,
    (start_time - duration) AS prev_start_time,
    (end_time - duration) AS prev_end_time

SELECT
    CAST(countIf(
        Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
    ) AS INTEGER) AS total_violations,

    CAST(countIf(
        Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= prev_end_time
    ) AS INTEGER) AS previous_total_violations,

    round(
        if(
            countIf(Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= prev_end_time) = 0,
            countIf(Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time) * 100.0,
            (
                countIf(Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time) -
                countIf(Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= prev_end_time)
            ) /
            countIf(Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= prev_end_time) * 100.0
        ), 4
    ) AS rate
FROM otel_traces
WHERE
    SpanName = 'governance.violation'
    AND Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time

d4f6b8ca-3e5a-4d7b-ae9c-1f2a3b4c5d6e.title: Violations Over Time
d4f6b8ca-3e5a-4d7b-ae9c-1f2a3b4c5d6e.description: Time-series chart showing governance violations grouped by time bucket

config.query:
WITH
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.start}}') AS start_time,
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.end}}') AS end_time,
    dateDiff('day', start_time, end_time) AS days_diff,
    dateDiff('year', start_time, end_time) AS years_diff,
    multiIf(
        years_diff >= 1, 'month',
        days_diff <= 1, 'hour',
        'day'
    ) AS date_granularity

SELECT
    CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER) AS violation_count,
    formatDateTime(DATE_TRUNC(date_granularity, Timestamp), '%Y/%m/%d %R') AS request_time
FROM otel_traces
WHERE
    SpanName = 'governance.violation'
    AND Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
GROUP BY request_time
ORDER BY request_time

e5a7c9db-4f6b-4e8c-bf0d-2a3b4c5d6e7f.title: Avg Policy Eval Latency
e5a7c9db-4f6b-4e8c-bf0d-2a3b4c5d6e7f.description: Average duration of governance policy evaluation spans in milliseconds with trend comparison

config.query:
WITH
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.start}}') AS start_time,
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.end}}') AS end_time,
    (end_time - start_time) AS duration,
    (start_time - duration) AS prev_start_time,
    (end_time - duration) AS prev_end_time

SELECT
    round(avgIf(
        toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['governance.policy.eval_latency_ms']),
        Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
        AND notEmpty(SpanAttributes['governance.policy.eval_latency_ms'])
    ), 2) AS avg_latency_ms,

    round(avgIf(
        toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['governance.policy.eval_latency_ms']),
        Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= prev_end_time
        AND notEmpty(SpanAttributes['governance.policy.eval_latency_ms'])
    ), 2) AS previous_avg_latency_ms,

    round(
        if(
            avgIf(
                toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['governance.policy.eval_latency_ms']),
                Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= prev_end_time
                AND notEmpty(SpanAttributes['governance.policy.eval_latency_ms'])
            ) = 0,
            avgIf(
                toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['governance.policy.eval_latency_ms']),
                Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
                AND notEmpty(SpanAttributes['governance.policy.eval_latency_ms'])
            ) * 100.0,
            (
                avgIf(
                    toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['governance.policy.eval_latency_ms']),
                    Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
                    AND notEmpty(SpanAttributes['governance.policy.eval_latency_ms'])
                ) -
                avgIf(
                    toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['governance.policy.eval_latency_ms']),
                    Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= prev_end_time
                    AND notEmpty(SpanAttributes['governance.policy.eval_latency_ms'])
                )
            ) /
            avgIf(
                toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['governance.policy.eval_latency_ms']),
                Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= prev_end_time
                AND notEmpty(SpanAttributes['governance.policy.eval_latency_ms'])
            ) * 100.0
        ), 4
    ) AS rate
FROM otel_traces
WHERE
    SpanName = 'governance.policy.evaluation'
    AND Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time

f6b8daec-5a7c-4f9d-c01e-3b4c5d6e7f8a.title: Violations by Agent
f6b8daec-5a7c-4f9d-c01e-3b4c5d6e7f8a.description: Violations grouped by agent name to identify which agents trigger the most governance violations

config.query:
WITH
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.start}}') AS start_time,
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.end}}') AS end_time

SELECT
    if(
        notEmpty(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name']),
        SpanAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'],
        'unknown'
    ) AS agent_name,
    CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER) AS violation_count
FROM otel_traces
WHERE
    SpanName = 'governance.violation'
    AND Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
GROUP BY agent_name
ORDER BY violation_count DESC
LIMIT 10

a7c9ebfd-6b8d-4a0e-d12f-4c5d6e7f8a9b.title: Recent Violations
a7c9ebfd-6b8d-4a0e-d12f-4c5d6e7f8a9b.description: Audit table showing recent governance violations with agent, tool, policy, and verdict details

config.query:
WITH
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.start}}') AS start_time,
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.end}}') AS end_time

SELECT
    formatDateTime(Timestamp, '%Y/%m/%d %R') AS time,
    if(
        notEmpty(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name']),
        SpanAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'],
        'unknown'
    ) AS agent,
    if(
        notEmpty(SpanAttributes['governance.tool']),
        SpanAttributes['governance.tool'],
        'N/A'
    ) AS tool,
    if(
        notEmpty(SpanAttributes['governance.policy']),
        SpanAttributes['governance.policy'],
        'N/A'
    ) AS policy,
    if(
        notEmpty(SpanAttributes['governance.verdict']),
        SpanAttributes['governance.verdict'],
        'N/A'
    ) AS verdict
FROM otel_traces
WHERE
    SpanName = 'governance.violation'
    AND Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
ORDER BY Timestamp DESC
LIMIT 50
